commonQuestions.question: What is BingX?
commonQuestions.answer: Founded 2018. Serves 10M+ users. Principal partner of Chelsea FC. Known for social/copy trading features. Offers spot, perpetual futures, and copy trading. Restricted in US, UK, Canada, Singapore, Netherlands.

commonQuestions.question: Is BingX safe?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX is a top-tier centralized exchange. CoinGecko trust score: 9/10 (rank #13).  Like all CEXs, funds are custodied by the exchange — use hardware wallets for long-term storage. Enable 2FA, use a strong unique password, and whitelist withdrawal addresses where available. Never share API keys.

commonQuestions.question: What is the BingX promo/referral code?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX currently uses a direct referral link via CryptoBonusWorld rather than a text code. Click the registration button on our BingX page to ensure the bonus is attributed correctly.

commonQuestions.question: How much is the BingX welcome bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Via CryptoBonusWorld, the current BingX welcome package totals up to 11,000 USDT — a regular welcome gift of 6,800+ USDT available to all new users, plus 4,200+ USDT in perks exclusive to referral sign-ups. The regular part is task-based: account creation earns 5–30 USDT, a two-day futures challenge unlocks up to 700 USDT in position vouchers, and cumulative futures volume milestones unlock up to 5,300+ USDT in token vouchers. The full amount requires very high trading volume — most users earn 50–250 USDT. Rewards are mostly trading vouchers, not withdrawable cash, and tasks vary by region.

commonQuestions.question: How do I claim the BingX bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Step 1: Click the registration link on the CryptoBonusWorld BingX page — the referral code/link is pre-filled. Step 2: Complete email/phone verification. Step 3: Complete KYC identity verification (required for bonuses). Step 4: Make a qualifying deposit (crypto transfer or card). Step 5: Check your Rewards Center / Bonus Hub for active tasks and complete trading volume milestones within the campaign window (usually 30 days). Vouchers are credited to your account as you complete each task tier.

commonQuestions.question: What are BingX spot trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX spot trading fees: 0.1% maker / 0.1% taker (standard).

commonQuestions.question: What are BingX futures trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX USDT-margined perpetual futures: 0.02% maker / 0.05% taker. Maximum leverage: 150×. Futures trading carries substantial risk of capital loss from liquidation. Up to 150× leverage available.

commonQuestions.question: Does BingX have P2P trading?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX does not currently offer P2P trading.

commonQuestions.question: Does BingX have copy trading?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX social trading allows copying experienced traders. Designed for beginner-to-intermediate users.

commonQuestions.question: Is BingX available in the United States?
commonQuestions.answer: No. BingX restricts US residents from registering. US users should use Coinbase or Kraken as regulated alternatives.

commonQuestions.question: Is BingX available in the United Kingdom?
commonQuestions.answer: UK availability for BingX should be verified on the official website, as FCA compliance and local regulatory status may affect service availability.

commonQuestions.question: What cryptocurrencies does BingX support?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX lists 802 cryptocurrencies across 852 trading pairs. BingX regularly lists emerging altcoins alongside major assets.

commonQuestions.question: Does BingX have a mobile app?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. BingX has official iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play) apps. Download from the official BingX website (https://bingx.com/app or equivalent) or directly from the official app store listing to avoid counterfeit apps.

commonQuestions.question: Does BingX require KYC?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. BingX requires KYC (identity verification) to unlock full trading, withdrawals, and welcome bonus eligibility. Process: government-issued ID + selfie/liveness check. Typically completes in 2–30 minutes for automated approval; up to 24 hours for manual review.

commonQuestions.question: Does BingX have Proof of Reserves?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX does not currently publish Proof of Reserves. Use caution with large balances on any exchange without PoR.

commonQuestions.question: What leverage does BingX offer?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX offers up to 150× leverage on futures. Standard: 10–20× for most trading pairs. High leverage available — suitable only for experienced traders with strict risk management. Leverage availability varies by asset and KYC level.

commonQuestions.question: When was BingX founded and who founded it?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX was founded in 2018. Founder: Elvisco Carrington.

commonQuestions.question: How many users does BingX have?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX serves 10M+ registered users across 100+ countries as of 2026.

commonQuestions.question: What is BingX's 24-hour trading volume?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX's 24-hour spot trading volume is approximately $0.53B (8448,67 BTC) as of the last data pull (2026-06-08). This places BingX at CoinGecko rank #13 by trust-adjusted volume.

commonQuestions.question: Does BingX have a native token?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX does not have its own native exchange token.

commonQuestions.question: What is BingX's CoinGecko trust score?
commonQuestions.answer: BingX has a CoinGecko trust score of 9/10, placing it at rank #13 globally. CoinGecko's trust score assesses exchange API accuracy, trading volume legitimacy, and cybersecurity posture.
